name: Filled Rich Chocolate Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the filling by beating the cream cheese with the sugar, egg, and salt until smooth.
2. Gradually add chocolate chips and set aside.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt.
5. Add water, vegetable oil, white vinegar, and vanilla to the dry ingredients. Mix until well combined for about 2 minutes on medium speed.
6. Fill paper-lined muffin cups two-thirds full with the batter.
7. Spoon one level tablespoon of filling into the center of each cupcake.
8. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from the pan and cool completely before serving.
